Key Benefits: Waktu proses turun 70-80%, akurasi >98%, capacity naik tanpa rekrut tambahan, compliance audit trail lengkap.
Customer Value Proposition: Otomatisasi dokumen kompleks dengan AI yang paham konteks Indonesia, ROI dalam 12-18 bulan.

Buying Trigger: Backlog dokumen meningkat, regulasi OJK minta turnaround lebih cepat, kompetitor sudah otomatisasi.
Common Objections: Akurasi AI untuk dokumen Indonesia/handwritten rendah; integrasi ke legacy core rumit.
Objection Handling: PoC 4-6 minggu dengan data real klien + phased rollout + human review untuk kasus kompleks + dedicated integration team.
Success Metrics: Processing time turun 70%, error rate <1%, ROI <18 bulan
Reference Project: Similar implementation di asuransi jiwa nasional & bank BUKU IV
Notes: Berdasarkan tren IDP global & demand tinggi di Indonesia untuk claims/underwriting automation. Phased approach recommended.

Key Benefits: TCO per km turun 15-25% dalam 5 tahun, emisi Scope 1 turun drastis, brand image hijau.

Pricing Range: Rp500 Jt - Rp5 Miliar+ per proyek (tergantung skala armada & charging)
Typical Decision Maker: COO / Supply Chain Director / Sustainability Head
Buying Trigger: Target net-zero holding, kenaikan harga BBM, regulasi daerah larang kendaraan fosil.

Upsell Products: Battery as a Service (BaaS), Second-life battery storage
Success Metrics: TCO reduction tercapai, uptime charging >99%, Scope 1 emission turun sesuai target
Reference Project: Proyek serupa di kurir express & 3PL Indonesia yang sedang transisi EV (target ribuan charger nasional)
Notes: Didorong oleh roadmap EV Indonesia (target puluhan ribu charger). Biaya charging station real IDR 500jt - 2M per unit.

Ideal Customer Profile: Gedung perkantoran/mall >20.000 m2 dengan BMS legacy atau manual control.
Key Features: Open Protocol BMS (Niagara/Siemens-like), IoT Sensor (temp, humidity, CO2, occupancy), Energy Analytics Dashboard, Predictive Maintenance AI, Tenant Mobile App, ESG Reporting
Key Benefits: Energy cost turun 15-25%, predictive maintenance kurangi breakdown 40%, tenant satisfaction naik, path ke EDGE/GRESB certification.
Customer Value Proposition: Bangunan cerdas yang hemat energi, nyaman penghuni, dan mudah dikelola dengan data real-time.
Business Outcome: OPEX facility turun, nilai aset properti naik, compliance sustainability tercapai.
Required Resources: BMS Engineer, IoT Specialist, Energy Consultant, Integration Expert
Pricing Model: Project-based EPC + SaaS subscription untuk platform + O&M
Pricing Range: Rp800 Jt - Rp8 Miliar per gedung (tergantung ukuran & scope)
Buying Trigger: Kontrak BMS existing habis, target green certification, tenant complain tinggi, kenaikan biaya listrik.
Common Objections: Disrupsi operasional selama upgrade, biaya awal tinggi.

Cross Sell Products: PROD-007 (Facility Management), PROD-003 (PLTS atap untuk gedung)
Upsell Products: Indoor Air Quality Monitoring & Alert System, Space Utilization Analytics
Success Metrics: Energy intensity turun ke target, complaint MEP <2%, predictive maintenance adoption >80%
Reference Project: Upgrade BMS di gedung Grade A Jakarta & Surabaya (provider seperti Schneider, Siemens, local integrator)
Notes: Real demand dari properti komersial yang ingin capai sustainability target. Open protocol penting untuk avoid vendor lock-in.

Product Description: Implementasi arsitektur Zero Trust end-to-end termasuk ZTNA (Zero Trust Network Access), Identity Governance, Micro-segmentation, Continuous Verification, dan integrasi dengan existing security stack.
Business Problem Solved: Perimeter security tidak cukup di era hybrid/cloud, risiko insider threat & breach tinggi, compliance UU PDP & regulasi sektor (OJK, Kesehatan) ketat.
Ideal Customer Profile: Organisasi dengan hybrid/multi-cloud environment dan mengelola data sensitif/PII dalam jumlah besar.
Key Features: ZTNA (replaces VPN), Continuous Authentication & Authorization, Micro-segmentation, Least Privilege Access, Real-time Risk Scoring, Policy as Code, Integration SIEM/EDR
Key Benefits: Reduce attack surface drastis, prevent lateral movement, compliance posture naik signifikan, visibility akses end-to-end.
Customer Value Proposition: Keamanan 'never trust, always verify' yang modern, scalable, dan sesuai regulasi Indonesia.
Business Outcome: Risiko breach turun drastis, MTTD/MTTR cepat, audit finding compliance berkurang.
Required Resources: Zero Trust Architect, Security Engineer, Identity Specialist, Change Management
Pricing Model: Project Implementation + Subscription per user/device atau per protected resource
Pricing Range: Rp300 Jt - Rp4 Miliar (implementation) + Rp20 Jt - Rp150 Jt / Bulan recurring
Typical Decision Maker: CISO / CIO / Head of IT Security
Buying Trigger: Kasus ransomware di industri serupa, audit eksternal temukan gap, persiapan compliance UU PDP full enforcement.
Common Objections: Kompleks & mahal; user experience akan terganggu (friction).
Objection Handling: Phased rollout mulai dari high-risk apps + shadow mode + user training & change management + measurable quick wins (reduce VPN dependency).
Cross Sell Products: PROD-006 (Managed SOC), PROD-002 (Cloud IaaS dengan security)
Upsell Products: Advanced Threat Protection, Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
Success Metrics: Zero Trust maturity score naik, breach attempts blocked, compliance audit pass
Reference Project: Zero Trust deployment di bank & healthcare provider Indonesia
Notes: Tren kuat pasca UU PDP. Fokus pada identity-centric security. Real demand dari CISO yang aware ransomware & data breach cases.

Product Description: Platform IoT + AI untuk monitoring kondisi aset (mesin, conveyor, genset, pompa) secara real-time dengan sensor vibration, temperature, oil analysis + predictive analytics untuk maintenance before failure.
Business Problem Solved: Maintenance reaktif menyebabkan unplanned downtime mahal, biaya suku cadang & tenaga tinggi, safety issue di site tambang & pabrik.
Ideal Customer Profile: Operasional dengan aset critical bernilai tinggi dan downtime berdampak besar ke produksi.

Key Benefits: Unplanned downtime turun 30-50%, maintenance cost turun 20-25%, safety improvement, extended asset life.
Customer Value Proposition: Dari reactive ke predictive maintenance dengan insight actionable yang langsung hemat biaya operasional.

Typical Decision Maker: Plant Director / Head of Maintenance / COO
Buying Trigger: Unplanned downtime sering & mahal, safety incident, target reliability tinggi dari management.

Upsell Products: Digital Twin Simulation, Autonomous Maintenance Recommendation

Ideal Customer Profile: Gudang dengan volume tinggi (>10.000 order/hari) atau multi-client 3PL yang butuh skalabilitas.
Key Features: WMS Cloud (real-time inventory, wave planning, slotting), AMR Fleet Management, Voice Picking Integration, Barcode/RFID, Integration ke Marketplace/TMS/ERP, Analytics & KPI Dashboard
Key Benefits: Fulfillment time turun 50-70%, picking accuracy >99.5%, throughput naik 2-3x, labor dependency turun.
Customer Value Proposition: Warehouse modern yang scalable, akurat, dan efisien dengan model RaaS (tanpa CAPEX robot besar).
Business Outcome: OTIF (On-Time In-Full) >98%, cost per order turun, customer satisfaction naik.
Required Resources: WMS Consultant, Robotics Engineer, Integration Specialist, Warehouse SME
Pricing Model: SaaS WMS per user/pallet + RaaS AMR (per robot/bulan) + Implementation
Pricing Range: Rp20 Jt - Rp150 Jt / Bulan (WMS) + Rp5 Jt - Rp15 Jt / robot / Bulan
Typical Decision Maker: COO / VP Supply Chain / Warehouse Manager
Buying Trigger: Ekspansi volume e-commerce, SLA buyer ketat, labor shortage, kompetitor sudah otomatisasi.
Common Objections: Biaya robot mahal; integrasi dengan existing system sulit.
Objection Handling: RaaS model (no heavy upfront) + PoC di 1 gudang + standard API integration + training & change management.
Cross Sell Products: PROD-010 (Dedicated Fleet), PROD-001 (BPO untuk returns processing)
Upsell Products: Predictive Inventory & Demand Forecasting, Value Added Services Automation
Success Metrics: Picking accuracy >99.5%, order cycle time reduction, labor productivity naik
Reference Project: WMS + AMR implementation di 3PL & e-commerce fulfillment center Indonesia
Notes: Tren warehouse automation naik tajam di Indonesia. RaaS model membuat accessible untuk mid-market.

Product Description: Platform FinOps terpusat untuk visibility, allocation, optimization, dan governance biaya multi-cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP, Alibaba) dengan policy as code, anomaly detection, dan chargeback/showback.
Business Problem Solved: Cloud spend overrun & tidak terkontrol, shadow IT, tag tidak konsisten, tidak ada visibility per business unit, audit finding biaya cloud.
Target Department: IT Finance / Cloud COE / CFO Office
Ideal Customer Profile: Organisasi dengan multi-cloud spend >Rp10 Miliar/bulan dan butuh kontrol serta accountability.
Key Features: Unified Cost Dashboard, Anomaly Detection & Alert, Rightsizing & Reserved Instance Recommendation, Policy as Code (FinOps), Chargeback/Showback, Carbon Footprint Tracking, Integration ke existing CMDB/ITSM
Key Benefits: Cloud cost turun 15-30% dalam 6 bulan pertama, visibility 100%, accountability per BU, compliance & audit ready.
Customer Value Proposition: Kontrol penuh atas cloud spend dengan insight actionable dan governance yang kuat tanpa menghambat agility tim engineering.
Business Outcome: Cloud OPEX terkendali, budget forecasting akurat, waste elimination, better decision making.
Required Resources: FinOps Consultant, Cloud Architect, Data Analyst, Change Management
Pricing Model: SaaS subscription berdasarkan cloud spend volume + Implementation & optimization service
Pricing Range: Rp50 Jt - Rp300 Jt / Bulan + success-based optimization fee
Typical Decision Maker: CFO / Group CIO / Head of Cloud / IT Finance
Buying Trigger: Cloud bill melonjak tidak terduga, audit internal/eksternal temukan waste, board minta cost control.
Common Objections: Butuh perubahan culture & process; data tag existing buruk.
Objection Handling: Quick win rightsizing & reserved instance + tag governance program parallel + executive dashboard untuk BOD + training FinOps certification.
Cross Sell Products: PROD-002 (Managed Cloud IaaS), PROD-006 (SOC untuk cloud security)
Success Metrics: Cloud spend reduction >15%, waste elimination, FinOps maturity score naik
Reference Project: FinOps implementation di konglomerat & bank dengan multi-cloud footprint
Notes: Real pain point besar di enterprise Indonesia yang sudah migrasi cloud. FinOps adalah best practice global yang sedang naik.
